channel.title: Student Services on Al-Qadisiyah University
channel.description: Recent content in Student Services on Al-Qadisiyah University

item.title: Accessing the Student Portal
item.description:
Student Portal (SIS)

The Student Portal is the official Student Information System used by Al-Qadisiyah University and all Iraqi universities. It is centrally managed by the Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research.

🔗 Portal URL: sis.mohesr.gov.iq

What You Can Do in the Portal

  • 📊 View your semester and final grades
  • 📅 See your weekly timetable
  • 📝 Check exam results
  • 📈 Track your cumulative academic record (GPA, credit hours)
  • 💳 View tuition fees and payment receipts
  • 📋 Submit re-examination and study-postponement requests
  • 🎓 Apply for graduation forms and ratification

First-Time Login

  1. Go to sis.mohesr.gov.iq
  2. Use your university ID number as the username (provided by your department)
  3. Default password: your university ID + year of birth (you will be prompted to change it on first login)
  4. Update your personal information and password

Forgot Your Password?

Use the “Forgot password” link inside the portal. If you do not receive a verification email, contact your college’s Registration Office.

item.title: Admission Plans
item.description:
Admission Plan for Academic Year 2025-2026

Capacity by College

College Morning Studies Evening Studies
Medicine 200 -
Dentistry 100 -
Pharmacy 150 -
Engineering 400 200
Science 350 150
Computer Science 300 150
Law 250 200
Education 500 250
Administration & Economics 400 300
Arts 350 200
Physical Education 200 100
Agriculture 250 -
Veterinary Medicine 100 -
Nursing 150 -

Total Capacity: ~6,000 students

New Specializations

The following specializations have been introduced for the current academic year:

item.title: Admission Requirements
item.description:
Overview

Al-Qadisiyah University welcomes all students wishing to join our academic journey. The university follows centralized admission standards approved by the Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research.

General Admission Requirements

For Morning Studies

  1. Obtain Iraqi Preparatory School Certificate or equivalent
  2. Achieve the required average according to college and major
  3. Pass medical examination (for health colleges)
  4. No disciplinary dismissal from another university

For Evening Studies

  1. Same requirements as morning studies
  2. Required averages differ from morning studies

Previous Admission Averages

College Scientific Branch Literary Branch
Medicine 98+ -
Engineering 85+ -
Science 70+ -
Law - 75+
Education 65+ 65+
Administration & Economics 60+ 60+

Note: Above averages are indicative and change annually based on capacity

item.title: Alumni Affairs
item.description:
Alumni Affairs

Al-Qadisiyah University maintains communication with its graduates and supports them in their professional journey.

Alumni Services

Alumni Database

  • Graduate data registration
  • Contact information updates
  • Career path tracking

Employment Opportunities

  • Job announcements from partner companies
  • Annual job fairs
  • Academic recommendations and references

Professional Development

  • Workshops and training courses
  • Career counseling programs
  • Continuing education opportunities

Certificates and Documents

  • Certificate copies
  • Document authentication
  • Official transcripts

Alumni Network

Join the Al-Qadisiyah University alumni network to connect with peers and exchange experiences and opportunities.

item.title: Career Opportunities
item.description:
Available Career Opportunities

Al-Qadisiyah University aims to connect its graduates with the job market by publishing available employment opportunities.

Current Job Announcements

Government Positions

Organization Position Required Major Deadline
Ministry of Health Resident Physician General Medicine 2026/02/28
Ministry of Education Secondary Teacher Science, Mathematics 2026/03/15
Ministry of Higher Education Teaching Assistant All Majors Open

Private Sector Positions

Company Position Required Major Deadline
Tech Company Software Developer Computer Science 2026/02/15
Private Hospital Pharmacist Pharmacy 2026/02/20
Engineering Firm Civil Engineer Civil Engineering 2026/03/01

Training Programs

Summer Training Program

The university, in cooperation with the private sector, offers summer training programs for students including:

item.title: Graduate Tracking
item.description:
Graduate Tracking System

Al-Qadisiyah University aims to track its graduates and maintain continuous communication to evaluate educational quality and connect them with employment opportunities.

Graduate Survey

All graduates are kindly requested to complete the following survey to help us improve our academic programs and track your career progress.

The graduate survey is not currently enabled. To participate, please email us at: info@qu.edu.iq

Statistics

Indicator Percentage
Employment within one year 75%
Working in field of study 68%
Employer satisfaction 85%
Pursuing postgraduate studies 22%

Contact

  • Email: alumni@qu.edu.iq
  • Phone: +964 780 000 0000

item.title: Honor Roll
item.description:
Honor Roll for Academic Year 2024-2025

We are proud of our outstanding students who have achieved academic excellence across various colleges.

Top Students University-Wide

First Stage

Rank Name College GPA
1 Ahmed Mohammed Ali College of Medicine 96.5%
2 Fatima Hussein Kareem College of Pharmacy 95.8%
3 Ali Abdullah Hassan College of Engineering 95.2%

Final Stage

Rank Name College GPA
1 Zainab Ahmed Mohammed College of Medicine 94.7%
2 Mohammed Saeed Jasim College of Dentistry 93.9%
3 Noor Ali Kadhim College of Engineering 93.5%

Top Students by College

College of Medicine

  • First: Zainab Ahmed Mohammed - 94.7%
  • Second: Ahmed Ali Hussein - 93.2%
  • Third: Sarah Mohammed Abdullah - 92.8%

College of Engineering

  • First: Noor Ali Kadhim - 93.5%
  • Second: Hussein Mohammed Ahmed - 92.1%
  • Third: Yasmin Saeed Kareem - 91.7%

College of Science

  • First: Maryam Hassan Ali - 92.3%
  • Second: Omar Ahmed Mohammed - 91.5%
  • Third: Ruqaya Ali Hussein - 90.8%

College of Computer Science

  • First: Ali Mohammed Kadhim - 94.1%
  • Second: Huda Saeed Ahmed - 93.3%
  • Third: Hussein Ali Jasim - 92.6%

Excellence Recognition Program

The university offers outstanding students:

item.title: Study in Iraq
item.description:
Study in Iraq Program

Al-Qadisiyah University welcomes international students from around the world to study in its diverse academic programs.

Why Al-Qadisiyah University?

  • Quality Education: Accredited and advanced academic programs
  • Affordable Tuition: Compared to regional universities
  • Rich Cultural Environment: Opportunity to learn about Iraq’s ancient civilization
  • Strategic Location: In the heart of Iraq with easy access

Programs for International Students

Bachelor’s Programs

  • Human Medicine (6 years)
  • Dentistry (5 years)
  • Pharmacy (5 years)
  • Engineering (4 years)
  • Sciences (4 years)

Graduate Programs

  • Master’s in various disciplines
  • PhD in various disciplines

Admission Requirements

  1. High school certificate or equivalent
  2. Certificate equivalency from relevant authorities
  3. Proof of language proficiency (Arabic or English)
  4. Meeting program-specific requirements

Application Steps

  1. Online Registration: Through Study in Iraq website
  2. Upload Documents: Required certificates and documents
  3. Pay Application Fee: Through electronic portal
  4. Await Admission: Application review and results announcement
  5. Visa Issuance: After final admission

Costs and Fees

Fees vary by program and specialization. For detailed fees:
